title: cistus creticus f. albus
intro: Cistus creticus f. albus, also known as white rockrose, is a plant species that belongs to the Cistaceae family, commonly found in the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiseptic properties. Cistus creticus f. albus has various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant properties, which may help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. The herbal preparations of Cistus creticus f. albus include essential oils, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions, or internally to support immune function and overall well-being.
